scripts.dev:monolith: npm --workspace services/monolith run dev 2>&1 | tee logs/monolith.log
scripts.dev:comments: npm --workspace services/comments-service run dev 2>&1 | tee logs/comments-svc.log
scripts.dev:auth: npm --workspace services/auth-service run dev 2>&1 | tee logs/auth-svc.log
scripts.worker:outbox: npm --workspace services/monolith run worker:outbox 2>&1 | tee logs/outbox-relay.log
scripts.worker:dlq-redrive: npm --workspace services/monolith run worker:dlq-redrive 2>&1 | tee logs/dlq-redrive.log
